title: clitoria guianensis f. chapadensis
intro: Clitoria guianensis f. chapadensis, also known as the butterfly pea or blue pea, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clitoria guianensis f. chapadensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as tea or capsules, and it is also used as a natural food coloring and dye.
